title: microlicia lhotzkyana
intro: Microlicia lhotzkyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the Melastome family, which is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Microlicia lhotzkyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Microlicia lhotzkyana may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
